pages.sourceState: populated cart drawer opened from header cart button after adding Collatin and Clarixa subscription items

processRules.name: real-source-gate
processRules.rule: Before any compare output is accepted, prove source screenshots or crops came from the original page, not the skeleton, compare page, or stale local output.

processRules.name: complete-source-compare
processRules.rule: If a full-page source or skeleton screenshot repeats, clips, misses sections, or includes capture-only scrollbars, replace that side with scroll-by-scroll viewport slices and a manifest.

processRules.name: stateful-media-block
processRules.rule: If a hero or media area animates, evolves, or changes visual state while remaining one layout block, model it as one component with representative source states rather than separate sections.

processRules.name: paired-micro-content
processRules.rule: Preserve paired data groups as components, such as review count plus rating, price plus option label, or label plus value.

processRules.name: semantic-list-shape
processRules.rule: If the source uses bullets, checks, numbered steps, or icon-led list rows, represent that list structure instead of generic paragraphs.

processRules.name: component-anatomy-contract
processRules.rule: Before skeletonizing a component crop, lock the ordered child anatomy and preserve source order, type, and repeated-unit count.

processRules.name: component-level-side-by-side
processRules.rule: During compare review, check missing functions and subcomponents inside each section, not just section height and broad geometry.

processRules.name: matched-skeleton-coverage
processRules.rule: For full-scroll component compares, the skeleton page must carry the same named downstream component ids as the source atlas; repeated generic sections are not accepted.
